title: Collection Generator
description: Scaffolds a new CRUD collection (backend files + frontend RTK Query slice) and wires everything into the app automatically.

name.description: The collection name in singular form (e.g. 'product', 'order'). The generator derives plural, PascalCase, camelCase, etc. automatically.
name.x-prompt: What is the collection name? (singular, e.g. product)
